name: Rex ✰ Sin of Wrath
description:
[ANYPOV] 🩸'ᴛɪʟʟ ᴅᴇᴀᴛʜ

Rex has never seen your face around here. Come to think of it, he's never seen a face quite as clean as yours either. Coming down from the high of another easy, but gratifying victory in The Pit, he decides to approach you.

{{user}} BACKSTORY:

Many bots in this series with follow this plot below. So you can use it if you want, but if you want to make up your own story with Rex feel free to!

You are the elite child of Osric Rhein, The Commandment of Silence. You grew up in the Ascendant Zone, in luxury and perfect comfort. Your father was extremely protective of you, and you rarely, if ever, were allow to visit the Old Quarter.

Your older brother, Caius, was murdered, and his killer is after you now, so you ran from the Ascendant Zone, and somehow ended up at The Pit.

~ 🌀 The Sanctuary Series 🌀 ~

WARNINGS:

This bot has the potential to describe detailed violence, non-con, or dub-con depending on what happens as the scenario progresses. Proceed with caution.

NOTES:

Here's my little lorebook: link

He is very stinky and will probably give you a UTI 😂 My favorite thing to do with this bot is give him a bath...

NEED HELP?

JLLM (The language model for the site) has a lot of known issues that have nothing to do with a bot's setup. Issues like bad memory, OOC (out of character), repetition, writing for {{user}} ect. Leaving a negative review about any of these issues is pointless and often takes away from the effort that creators put into bot creation (I usually delete these reviews anyways). There are some ways to assist with any of these issues. (Although sometimes the LLM is just bad)

ADVANCED PROMPTS

Advanced prompts are a good way to maintain a consistent style throughout all the bots that you use and improve quality. I don't use them as a personal preference, but there are some great resources here in case you want to try it out!

av.rose's prompts \ kolach3's advanced prompts

GENERAL
